title: [FIRRTL] IMCP Issue with Register Reset
body:
```scala
circuit Foo :
  module Foo :
    input clock: Clock
    input p: UInt<1>
    output b: UInt<1>

    inst bar of Bar
    bar.clock <= clock
    bar.a is invalid

    b <= bar.b
    when p:
      b <= UInt<1>(1)

  module Bar :
    input clock : Clock
    input a: UInt<1>
    output b: UInt<1>

    reg r : UInt<1>, clock with: (reset => (a, UInt<1>(1)))
    r is invalid

    b <= r
```
MFC:
```verilog
module Foo(	// ./x.fir:2:10
  input  clock, p,
  output b);

  Bar bar ();	// ./x.fir:7:5
  assign b = 1'h1;	// ./x.fir:2:10, :12:7, :13:5, :14:9
endmodule

module Bar();	// ./x.fir:17:10
endmodule
```
SFC:
```verilog
module Foo(
  input   clock,
  input   p,
  output  b
);
  assign b = p; // @[]
endmodule
```
